halts.trigger_clause: Relay 049 §HALT IF: 'HALT_049_JTNB_VERDICT_AWAITED: P3 not satisfied.' HALT if AWAITED -- without verdict the decision is ambiguous; the prompt should fire only after JTNB clock has ticked.'
